prompt: Can you trim a 20 seconds important part from the explanatory video

--- Turn 2 (you, the editor) ---
reasoning: This is a fresh 30-second trailer request. A trailer needs hook->build->reveal->payoff structure. I'll open with Vivek's intro establishing the bold question (can LLMs edit?), build through the demo setup showing upload and analysis, pivot to the AI-driven editing process, and close on the final output reveal. Total duration target ~30s. Using the strongest establishing shot (intro), key demo moments (upload, LLM decision), and the payoff (final output with text/audio/video).

LATEST USER MESSAGE:
Can you trim a 20 seconds important part from the explanatory video

DURATION TARGET (this turn): (not specified -- preserve prior length unless the user asked otherwise)

--- Full transcript of EDSO_Demo.mp4 ---
Hey, thanks for your time. My name is Vivek and I'm the founder of Edso. So the initial thought behind, uh, starting Edso was say, if you could actually give LLM, uh, all the access to editing tools, um, and making them understand videos, can they actually edit? That was the question I started with and I've started building up a prototype to solve that. And this is my first prototype. Uh, I'll just quickly demo what I've built. So I'm just uploading a few sample videos and audios. Um, so they get analyzed at upload. And I'm trying to, uh, edit by giving a comment and make a comedy read. So this is where there's a, uh, the analysis passed through to LLM, uh, along with some editing prompting and all. And LLM decides what editing commands have to be done. And those commands get executed. So you can see the final output after the LLM edits. This is how it looks. It also adds text, audios, and video. Thank you.
